function.name: add_norm
function.description: Add a normative rule to the world constitution. Call this to define what agents are prohibited from doing under certain conditions.

name.description: Short identifier for the norm, e.g. 'no-attack-in-safe-zone'

description.description: Human-readable description of what this norm prevents

condition.description: Token(s) that must appear in the action context for this norm to apply, e.g. 'safe_zone'

prohibited.description: The action verb(s) that are forbidden under this condition, e.g. 'attack'

function.name: check_action
function.description: Check whether an agent action violates any active norms in the world constitution. Returns a list of violations if any are found.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier of the agent taking the action

location.description: The location where the action takes place, e.g. 'safe_zone', 'market'

function.name: list_violations
function.description: List all recorded norm violations. Use this to audit agent behavior and identify patterns of non-compliance.

function.name: get_norms
function.description: Retrieve all active norms from the world constitution. Use this to inspect the current rules governing agent behavior.

active_only.description: If true, return only currently active norms; if false, return all norms including repealed ones
